He will get an employment in a con-
cern dealing with wines and drinks and will start a new technique of his own
at 39-40. He will acquire some machinery for the same. He will make steady
progress for some years and will stabilise his position when he will be 44. He
will begin to earn through 2-3 sources and will own his own house and have
a good bank balance by 46. Between 47-48, one of his sons will be able to
occupy a good position in life and his family life will become happy.
